project_type: Static HTML product landing page for Manulife Saving Protector (MSP)
verification_instructions: Open index.html in browser, verify all tabs work, calculator produces correct values
setup_instructions: No setup needed - single HTML file
environment_constraints: INTEGRATIONS_ONLY network - no external packages, CDN, or fonts allowed. Everything must be self-contained in a single HTML file.
key_patterns: Follow index (17).html template: green Manulife theme, sticky WA banner, tabbed content, card-based layout, responsive CSS, all inline in single file
directory_structure: /projects/sandbox/Project-msp/ - flat directory with xlsx/pdf product files and the template HTML
